prompt: Create a vertical graphite pencil portrait on warm off-white textured paper of a young woman shown from the chest up, centered and facing forward. She has long, softly wavy dark brown hair parted near the middle, smooth youthful facial features, large expressive eyes, full natural eyebrows, a small straight nose, and a subtle closed-mouth smile. She wears oversized black rectangular eyeglasses with translucent amber-yellow tinted lenses; one hand is raised to the left side of the glasses as if adjusting the frame, showing slim fingers and a small ring. Add delicate jewelry: exactly 3 visible pieces, a ring on the raised hand, a thin bracelet on the wrist, and layered fine necklaces with one small round pendant. Dress her in a slightly shiny collared button-up blouse with soft folds and open neckline. Render the image as a highly detailed realistic charcoal-and-graphite sketch with fine crosshatching, visible pencil construction lines, softly shaded skin, detailed hair strands, and subtle smudging; keep the background minimal with faint rectangular guide lines and sketch marks. Use mostly monochrome gray pencil tones, with the eyeglass lenses the only warm colored accent. Maintain a calm, elegant studio portrait mood, symmetrical composition, no text, no watermark, no photorealistic color background.
promptEn: Create a vertical graphite pencil portrait on warm off-white textured paper of a young woman shown from the chest up, centered and facing forward. She has long, softly wavy dark brown hair parted near the middle, smooth youthful facial features, large expressive eyes, full natural eyebrows, a small straight nose, and a subtle closed-mouth smile. She wears oversized black rectangular eyeglasses with translucent amber-yellow tinted lenses; one hand is raised to the left side of the glasses as if adjusting the frame, showing slim fingers and a small ring. Add delicate jewelry: exactly 3 visible pieces, a ring on the raised hand, a thin bracelet on the wrist, and layered fine necklaces with one small round pendant. Dress her in a slightly shiny collared button-up blouse with soft folds and open neckline. Render the image as a highly detailed realistic charcoal-and-graphite sketch with fine crosshatching, visible pencil construction lines, softly shaded skin, detailed hair strands, and subtle smudging; keep the background minimal with faint rectangular guide lines and sketch marks. Use mostly monochrome gray pencil tones, with the eyeglass lenses the only warm colored accent. Maintain a calm, elegant studio portrait mood, symmetrical composition, no text, no watermark, no photorealistic color background.
promptZh: 在暖色调的灰白色纹理纸上创作一幅垂直的石墨铅笔肖像，展示 一位年轻女性 的胸部以上特写，居中且面向前方。她留着长而柔和的波浪形 深棕色头发，中分，面部轮廓光滑年轻，眼睛大而有神，眉毛浓密自然，鼻子小巧挺直，嘴角带着微妙的闭合微笑。她戴着超大号黑色长方形眼镜，镜片为半透明的 琥珀黄色；一只手抬起至眼镜左侧，仿佛正在调整镜框，露出纤细的手指和一枚小戒指。添加精致的首饰：共 3 件可见饰品，包括抬起的手上的戒指、手腕上的细手链，以及带有小圆吊坠的叠戴细项链。让她穿着一件略带光泽的翻领衬衫，衣褶柔和，领口微开。将图像渲染为高度细腻的写实炭笔和石墨素描，具有精细的交叉排线、可见的铅笔构图线条、柔和的皮肤阴影、细致的发丝和微妙的涂抹效果；背景保持极简，带有淡淡的长方形辅助线和素描痕迹。主要使用单色灰色铅笔色调，仅眼镜镜片为唯一的暖色调点缀。保持冷静、优雅的摄影棚肖像氛围，构图对称，无文字，无水印，无写实彩色背景。
